positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric fox howling at a crescent moon, rendered in a modern Art Deco aesthetic. The fox silhouette is crisp and elegant, composed of sharp, angular lines and clean negative space. The background features repeating stylized floral and celestial patterns, using a limited palette of deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and cream. Focus on strong, graphic contrast and symmetry, suitable for apparel printing. Composition should be centered and balanced. Vector art quality, high detail, clean lines, flat lay presentation, symmetrical composition.
